name: atomic
description: An evidence-backed data substrate with document extraction, model-driven semantic parsing, deterministic identity folding, and a first-party CLI.

scripts.test: node test.mjs && node test-parser.mjs && node test-fold.mjs && node test-cli.mjs && node test-semantic.mjs && node test-documents.mjs
scripts.seed: node seeds/seed-a.mjs && node seeds/seed-b.mjs && node seeds/seed-c.mjs && node seeds/seed-d.mjs

comment: Zero required dependencies. pg and external document tools are optional.
